case_title: PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP/DBA STONESTOWN APTS. vs. JACKSON, ALVIN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, ALVIN JACKSON, TANYA
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP/DBA STONESTOWN APTS. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, ALVIN JACKSON, TANYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 460 WINSTON DR, #304 $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT DUE IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100.00 STARTING ON 12/17/94 TO PLTF'S LEASING AGENT; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 12/2/94; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP/DBA STONESTOWN APTS. AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ALVIN JACKSON, TANYA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED, STIPULATION PURSUANT TO STIP SUBMITTED TO COURT.
JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO 285 HANOVER AVE, #4, OAKLAND, CA 94606 PER DEFTS. REQUEST AT TRIAL. (NEW ADDRESS).
